info.name: Google Calendar Sync
info.summary: Synchronize Google Calendar events with your Nextcloud calendar
info.description:
Sync your Google Calendar events with Nextcloud Calendar — no admin help required.
**Features:** - Per-user OAuth 2.0 setup with Google (Desktop app credentials) - Sync individual Google calendars to individual Nextcloud calendars - Read-only merge: sync multiple Google calendars into one Nextcloud calendar - Bidirectional sync: events created in Nextcloud are pushed back to Google - Configurable sync interval (default: every 5 minutes) - Secure per-user token storage
info.author: You
